title: Care Gaps
description: The Care Gaps module identifies populations of patients who have not received recommended preventive services, screenings, or treatments as defined by clinical quality measures. Researchers and care managers can use this feature to prioritize outreach, close quality gaps, and monitor improvement over time against standardized benchmarks.
tips: Define your eligible population cohort precisely before configuring a care gap measure to avoid including patients who are genuinely exempt from the recommendation.
Leverage existing concept sets for procedure and observation criteria to keep care gap definitions consistent with other analyses in your study.
Run care gap analyses across multiple data sources to understand whether gaps reflect true clinical patterns or data completeness issues at a particular site.
Schedule recurring gap evaluations on a fixed cadence so that trend data accumulates and improvement over time can be quantified.
